summary: Tested Newsletter email capture feature and POTW cron task. Backend: 11/11 tests passed for newsletter subscribe/unsubscribe endpoints and POTW task registration. Frontend: All newsletter UI elements working - email input, subscribe button, success state display.
passed_tests: POST /api/newsletter/subscribe with valid email returns 'subscribed' status
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe with same email returns 'already_subscribed' status
POTW cron task 'send_product_of_the_week' is registered in APScheduler
POTW task has schedule '0 11 * * 3' (Wednesday 11 AM UTC)
POTW task description contains 'Product of the Week'
Trending nav link visible in header navigation
Product of the Week section displays on landing page
POTW featured product card shows product details
Newsletter email input is visible and enabled
Newsletter form submission shows success state 'You're on the list!'
critical_code_review_comments: Newsletter endpoints properly handle all edge cases (invalid email, duplicate subscription, resubscription after unsubscribe)
POTW cron task correctly registered with schedule '0 11 * * 3' (Wednesday 11 AM UTC)
Newsletter component uses proper data-testid attributes for testing
test_credentials: API key for automation: X-API-Key: vs_automation_key_2024
seed_data_creation: Created test newsletter subscribers with TEST_ prefix for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Newsletter capture feature fully tested. POST /api/newsletter/subscribe and /api/newsletter/unsubscribe are public endpoints (no auth required). POTW task 'send_product_of_the_week' registered with schedule '0 11 * * 3' (Wednesday 11 AM UTC). Newsletter component has data-testid attributes: newsletter-section, newsletter-email-input, newsletter-subscribe-btn. Success state shows 'You're on the list!' message.

potw_cron_task.description: Send Product of the Week email with referral links to all subscribers

ui_elements: Success state 'You're on the list!' with checkmark icon
Product of the Week section with featured product
